title: lepianthes peltata
intro: Lepianthes peltata, also known as the Peltate Lepianthes, is a type of flowering plant species within the Gentianaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems. Lepianthes peltata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, with the leaves and roots being used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
